chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 1443 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 5614/2022 3.For hearing of main case 17-01-2023 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State along with ASI/I.O Nasrullah Soomro of P.S, A-Section, Ghotki (respondent No.2). ***** None present for the petitioners. I.O of Crime No.352 of 2022 registered at P.S, A-section, Ghotki under Sections 452, 365-B PPC is present and files statement to the effect that he recorded statement of alleged detenue Mst. Zulekha on 01.12.2022 from Darul Aman Sukkur under Section 161 Cr.P.C, in which she disclosed that no one has abducted her and she had left the house of her husband due to torture. It is further stated that on the basis of such statement of alleged detenue, case/FIR was disposed of under C-class and final report bearing No.61 of 2022 dated 12.01.2023 was submitted before 1st Judicial Magistrate, Ghotki; copy of the report is annexed with the statement. It appears that the purpose of filing this petition has been served. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
